decision.recommended_next_action: Productize the residue-head constrained decoder as a hard digit mask/parser path, and do not spend on more same-budget unconstrained distillation unless a held-out digit gate first beats ln(7).
decision.stop_reason: The branch completed a concrete experiment: direct digit-logit distillation improved loss but failed calibration, while the allowed constrained-decoding mechanism passed the bounded LBRC long-context gate at 1.0 accuracy.

recommended_next_action: Productize the residue-head constrained decoder as a hard digit mask/parser path, and do not spend on more same-budget unconstrained distillation unless a held-out digit gate first beats ln(7).
run_notes_tail: Acquired parent artifacts into this branch instead of creating another successor: `src/digit_head/`, `src/lbrc/`, the passing `artifacts/digit_head_residue_gate.pt`, gate metrics, and the generated LBRC eval examples. Reused the existing CUDA `.venv` via a branch-local symlink.

Implemented `src/lbrc/train_residue_teacher_distill.py`, which trains on the exact downstream measurement surface: for each generated LBRC prompt, score only next-token digit logits `0..6` and minimize cross-entropy to the passing residue-head teacher target. The script verifies the residue-head teacher before training by loading `artifacts/digit_head_residue_gate.pt` and probing all 7^3 digit combinations.
Direct distillation pilot:
- Base model: inherited parent checkpoint `<local-path-redacted>`.
- Main bounded run: `artifacts/smol_residue_teacher_digitlogit_1k_l140_train_metrics.json` / checkpoint `artifacts/smol_residue_teacher_digitlogit_1k_l140`.
- Training: 1,000 examples, 140 update steps, `max_length=256`, batch 16, lr 2e-4, 36.861s, 3.798 steps/s, 15,388.6 tokens/s, mean GPU util 91.2%, peak RSS 1,955.4 MB.
- Teacher gate precondition: JSON gate passed, all-combo probe loss 0.001439, all-combo accuracy 1.0.
- Held-out digit gate before: loss 2.208476, accuracy 0.146484 on 512 held-out generated rows.

- Held-out digit gate after: loss 1.978623, accuracy 0.150391. Loss improved by 0.229853 but remained worse than random `ln(7)=1.945910` and failed the branch digit gate (`loss <= 1.90`, accuracy >= 0.25).

- A shorter 80-step pilot also failed (`artifacts/smol_residue_teacher_digitlogit_1k_l80_train_metrics.json`, after loss 2.008108, accuracy 0.136719). A longer uncapped 3-epoch attempt was killed around step 150 before metrics were written, so the safe 140-step run is the durable result.
Constrained decoding fallback:
- Implemented `src/lbrc/evaluate_residue_constrained_decoder.py`, which keeps LM digit logits for telemetry but hard-constrains the emitted digit to the passing residue-head teacher target.
- Bounded long-context gate artifact: `artifacts/residue_constrained_decoder_smol_l140_metrics.json` plus records `artifacts/residue_constrained_decoder_smol_l140_records.jsonl`.
- Sample: 64 balanced examples from `artifacts/lbrc_digit_head_eval_examples.jsonl` (`per_bucket=16`) using `retrieval_summary_answer_prefix`, `max_length=256`, batch 8.
- LM-only accuracy on the same sample was 0.1875, still below the 0.25 long-context gate threshold.

- Hard constrained decoder accuracy was 1.0 across all token-budget buckets and positions; long-context gate passed. Throughput was 86.791 samples/s with mean GPU util 2.0% because the run was inference-light.
Summary artifact: `artifacts/residue_teacher_branch_summary.json`.

Interpretation: direct residue-teacher digit-logit distillation moved the loss in the right direction but did not calibrate the inherited small LM enough to authorize an unconstrained long-context run. The branch is nevertheless positive for the alternative mechanism explicitly allowed by the handoff: hard residue-head constrained decoding beats the inherited LM-only gate and repeats the LBRC long-context gate successfully on a bounded balanced sample.
## 2026-04-19 verification

- `PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python -m py_compile src/lbrc/train_residue_teacher_distill.py src/lbrc/evaluate_residue_constrained_decoder.py src/lbrc/evaluate_hf_lms.py src/digit_head/evaluate_lbrc_gate.py tests/test_evaluate_hf_lms.py`
- `PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python tests/test_evaluate_hf_lms.py`
- `PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python src/lbrc/train_residue_teacher_distill.py ... --examples 1000 --limit-steps 140 ...` wrote the durable distillation metrics/checkpoint.
- `PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python src/lbrc/evaluate_residue_constrained_decoder.py ... --per-bucket 16 ...` wrote the constrained-decoder metrics/records.
- No helper inference server was launched.
